prompt_used: This is Volunteer Search Lead Ellis Vann. I should not be leaving this message. Something about frame glitch cluster is wrong, and The Editor wants us to panic before anyone checks the chain of custody. Survive and protect a secret. Please move quietly when you come to closed wilderness watch station and ranger tunnels.
